metadata.name: Think Twice flashback — cast from graveyard, exiled on resolution
metadata.description: Demonstrates the Flashback keyword (CR 702.34a). Think Twice is already in p1's graveyard (having been cast normally earlier). p1 casts Think Twice via its flashback cost ({2}{U}) from the graveyard. Both players pass priority. Think Twice resolves and draws a card for p1. Because the flashback cost was paid, Think Twice is exiled (not put into p1's graveyard) when it leaves the stack (CR 702.34a). Final: Think Twice in exile, not in graveyard; p1 drew 1 card.
metadata.generation_notes: Think Twice oracle text (Scryfall): 'Draw a card. Flashback {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)' Mana cost {1}{U} (MV=2). Flashback cost {2}{U}. The scenario starts mid-game with Think Twice already in p1's graveyard (from a prior normal cast). p1 has {2}{U} in pool — exactly the flashback cost. p1 has 1 card in library so the draw effect succeeds. Cast_spell_flashback action type in replay harness (added in CR 702.34 implementation): finds card in graveyard by name instead of hand, then constructs Command::CastSpell. The engine determines flashback by checking (a) card zone == Graveyard(player) and (b) card has KeywordAbility::Flashback. The cast_with_flashback flag is set on the StackObject. On resolution (608.2), the engine checks cast_with_flashback and redirects the destination zone to Exile instead of Graveyard (702.34a). Per CR 118.9c, the spell's mana value remains based on its printed mana cost {1}{U} (MV=2), not the flashback cost. Initial hand count: 0 (no cards in hand — Think Twice is in graveyard, not hand). Post-resolution: hand count 1 (drew 1 card), graveyard empty, exile has Think Twice.

script.step_note: p1 casts Think Twice via flashback from graveyard

actions.description: Initial: Think Twice in p1's graveyard, p1 has {2}{U} in pool, hand empty
actions.note: Think Twice is in the graveyard from a prior normal cast. p1 has {2}{U} ready to pay the flashback cost.
CR 702.34a: p1 casts Think Twice from graveyard by paying the flashback cost {2}{U} instead of the mana cost {1}{U}. CR 601.2b: only one alternative cost may be applied.

actions.description: After flashback cast: Think Twice on stack, no longer in graveyard
actions.note: Think Twice moved from graveyard to stack. The stack_object has cast_with_flashback: true.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Think Twice resolves; p1 draws 1 card.

actions.note: CR 608.2 / CR 702.34a: Spell resolves; draw effect executes; because cast_with_flashback is true, the card is exiled instead of going to the graveyard.

actions.description: After resolution: Think Twice exiled (not in graveyard), p1 drew 1 card, stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.34a: Think Twice is in exile because the flashback cost was paid. It is NOT in the graveyard. p1 drew 1 card from the Mountain in library.
